/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Actor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Animator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Gate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Sector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/SectorSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/Velce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Velce.dir/src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o -o Velce  _deps/crossguid-build/libcrossguid.a /usr/local/lib/libyaml-cpp.a /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.2800.0 /usr/lib/libSDL2_image.so -luuid
